dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For ten years, I was 'Loki'. The undisputed top player of 'Pick Me Up!'. A master strategist, a gacha god, a legend.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Another S-rank clear. Pathetic. Do these noobs even try?

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: My team composition was flawless. My resource management, impeccable. Who else could clear 'Hell's Gate' with a single 1-star unit?

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: The only thing left to do is… grind for more stars. Or maybe finally touch grass. Nah, who am I kidding? There's always another challenge.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But then, something... unexpected happened.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ZZZZZZZZT!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE! WHIRRRRR...

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: What the—? My screen's going haywire! Is this a new event? A bug?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BRIGHT FLASH!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! ZAP!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: My head... it feels like it's being ripped apart. What is this sensation?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Ugh... Where am I? This isn't my room. This isn't even... a room.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Stone walls, flickering torchlight, the smell of damp earth and... monster guts? This looks exactly like the 'Slime Caverns' dungeon.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Wait. Why do I feel so... heavy? And stiff? I can barely move my neck.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANK! SCRAPE!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: What was that sound? It came from me. My hands... they're not hands. They're crude, rock-like appendages. And my body... it's made of stone.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: No. No, no, no. This can't be happening. I'm a Golem. A basic, 1-star Golem. The lowest of the low-tier summons!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Me? Loki? The man who commanded entire legions of S-rank heroes? Reduced to this pathetic form? This is a nightmare!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: System. Status window. Anything! Show me my stats!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: [STATUS WINDOW APPEARS]

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Name: Golem (Han Seol). Rank: 1-star. Level: 1. HP: 100/100. Attack: 5. Defense: 10. Skills: None. Passive: Stone Body (Reduces physical damage by 10%).

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: This is a joke, right? My attack is 5? A slime could probably take me down!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: And who's this 'Han Seol'? That's my real name! So I'm not just a Golem, I'm *me* inside a Golem. This is beyond messed up.

dialogue.speaker: Summoner (off-screen)
dialogue.line: Finally! A Golem! Took you long enough, you useless gacha system!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: That voice... so whiny. And that mana signature... weak. Pathetically weak. This must be my summoner.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Through the gaps in the other summoned units, Han Seol saw her. A young girl, maybe in her early twenties, clutching a staff, her face streaked with dirt and despair.

dialogue.speaker: Summoner
dialogue.line: Alright, Golem! Front line! Protect the others! We're almost out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Front line? With these stats? Is she trying to get me killed? What kind of incompetent summoner is this?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SQUELCH! GROWL!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From the shadows, a monstrous, multi-eyed creature with razor-sharp claws lunged forward.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: A Cave Lurker! Level 5, high agility, decent attack. A single hit would probably shatter me.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: This is bad. Very bad. I'm a 1-star Golem, stuck with a clueless summoner, facing an enemy that outclasses me by a mile.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: But... I'm Loki. The 'King of Pick Me Up'. I didn't get to the top by panicking. I got there by strategizing. Even as a Golem, I'm still me.

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: First, assess the situation. Second, identify weaknesses. Third, survive. This isn't a game anymore. This is reality. And I refuse to be fodder.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR!

dialogue.speaker: Summoner
dialogue.line: Golem! Block it!

dialogue.speaker: Han Seol (Loki)
dialogue.line: Block it, she says. Fine. Let's see what this 'Stone Body' can really do.

summary: Han Seol, the legendary 'Loki' of the mobile game 'Pick Me Up!', finds himself unexpectedly transmigrated into the game world as a weak 1-star Golem. Faced with his pathetic stats and an incompetent summoner, he must quickly adapt to survive his first encounter with a dangerous dungeon monster.
